executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Please do deep QA testing. Check navigation (no blank pages, all menus working), login (empty, incorrect, success, logout), users page (CRUD, search, validation), stores page (CRUD, search, validation), map/heatmap (markers, interaction, zoom/drag), settings (change, save, reload). Also focus on UI/UX (broken buttons, overlapping text), Mobile responsiveness (simulate iPhone/Android viewport sizes), Console errors/warnings, and Performance (heavy rendering, slow loads, click delays). Provide bug reports with severity, repro steps, and suggestions, plus list passed tests.
